misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: Martin, representing St. Laurence Golf, is set to make his eleventh appearance at the distinguished Hector Trophée 2026. His consistent presence over a decade underscores a steadfast dedication to the unique challenges of this pair competition, establishing him as a familiar and highly regarded figure within its competitive landscape.

Martin stands among the elite few who have claimed victory in both the team and individual categories. He has been a pivotal member of a duo that successfully lifted the coveted Hector Trophée, demonstrating his strategic insight and ability to perform effectively within the paired format. On a separate occasion, he also secured the prestigious individual Victor Trophy, a testament to his versatile prowess and exceptional ability to excel under pressure.

Beyond his formidable competitive record, Martin is known for his distinctly relaxed approach to the game, a trait often exemplified by his casual presence on the course, rarely seen without a refreshing beverage in hand. This unique blend of championship capability and an unperturbed demeanor makes him a captivating figure. As he prepares for his eleventh outing, his proven ability to secure both team and individual victories positions him as a strong candidate for continued success.
